generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that terrorists exploit. The 2023 London attack could've been prevented if agents had more authority to act on suspicious patterns. #NationalSecurity #SafetyFirst
